title: Colored Bundles ABANDONED
description: Makes Bundles Dyeable like shulker boxes!
body:
## Mojang now made a bundles dyeable in vanila minecraft bruh
![bruh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ff05a5f4ac734b885e63e0f876a177cb3d124cf.png)

# Colored Bundles
This data pack adds dyeable bundles like shulker boxes. And that's all!

![All bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f696a7600de480e956bd0cdf6a7ea4662365ce75.png)

**How to craft?**

Craft a bundle with dye. Warning! Your bundle must be empty or your lost all items in this bundle!

![Crafting The Bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e9eaad2188643cab1a2bf76f31d2d0c2cd80c45.png)

This Data Pack requires to enable bundles data pack in your world

**Know Bug**

Dyed Bundles don't change it's texture when filled - I fix this soon
